message:
fix(core): optimize synonyms expansion and enforce tag schema

- Optimized expandQuery in synonyms.ts to use precomputed reverse map (O(1) vs O(N))
- Enforced strict lowercase kebab-case for tags in PromptSchema
- Fixed color consistency in Toast component (unauthorized indigo -> sky)
- Fixed framer-motion compatibility in Vitest (mocked importOriginal and global motion components)
- Updated obsolete unit tests in PromptCard, Toast, and BasketSidebar to match current implementation
- Added performance regression test for synonyms expansion

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ export const PromptSchema = z.object({
   title: z.string().min(1).max(100),
   description: z.string().min(1).max(200),
   category: PromptCategorySchema,
-  tags: z.array(z.string()).min(1),
+  tags: z.array(z.string().regex(/^[a-z0-9-]+$/, "Tags must be lowercase kebab-case")).min(1),
   author: z.string().min(1),
   twitter: z.string().regex(/^@[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/).optional(),
   version: z.string().regex(/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/),
